instruction:
Patch the station scene: restore missing clock-hour, remove the duplicate clock-minute, put platform-edge back to its thin height, and repair overhead-wire's path.

Patch:
- overhead-wire.d: "M8 14 C42 28 74 2 108 14 S176 30 212 12" -> "M8 18 C42 10 74 10 108 18 S176 26 212 18"
- platform-edge.height: 10 -> 5
- remove clock-minute-dup
- add clock-hour: <line id="clock-hour" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1.5" x1="196" y1="31" x2="196" y2="23" />
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 220 140" width="220" height="140">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="220" height="140" fill="#f4feff" />
  <rect id="sky-band" fill="#cffafe" x="0" y="0" width="220" height="64" />
  <path id="overhead-wire" fill="none" stroke="#334155" stroke-width="1" d="M8 14 C42 28 74 2 108 14 S176 30 212 12" />

  <line id="rail-front" stroke="#475569" stroke-width="3" x1="0" y1="130" x2="220" y2="130" />

  <rect id="track-tie-3" fill="#7c2d12" x="94" y="116" width="7" height="18" />
  <rect id="track-tie-4" fill="#7c2d12" x="132" y="116" width="7" height="18" />
  <rect id="track-tie-5" fill="#7c2d12" x="170" y="116" width="7" height="18" />
  <rect id="train-body" fill="#0ea5e9" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1.5" x="26" y="38" width="126" height="46" rx="6" ry="6" />
  <rect id="train-roof" fill="#0369a1" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" x="34" y="30" width="110" height="12" rx="4" ry="4" />
  <rect id="window-left" fill="#bfdbfe" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" x="38" y="46" width="24" height="16" />
  <rect id="window-center" fill="#bfdbfe" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" x="68" y="46" width="24" height="16" />

  <rect id="train-door" fill="#fef3c7" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" x="128" y="44" width="16" height="34" />
  <circle id="door-handle" fill="#222" cx="140" cy="61" r="1.6" />
  <circle id="wheel-left" fill="#111827" cx="48" cy="86" r="6" />
  <circle id="wheel-right" fill="#111827" cx="126" cy="86" r="6" />
  <line id="signal-post" stroke="#334155" stroke-width="4" x1="170" y1="32" x2="170" y2="94" />
